overall.description: A first-person walk through a grand, ornate cathedral interior with stone architecture and warm golden lighting. The camera moves steadily toward a large carved wooden door at the end of the hall, featuring highly reflective polished marble floors and decorative statues in wall niches. High-quality game engine footage with realistic global illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand cathedral nave with ceremonial door

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the cathedral nave toward the large ornate wooden door

entered.detail: large carved wooden door with metal bands and intricate patterns at the end of the hall
ornate stone arch surrounding the door with decorative columns
large ceremonial urn on a stone pedestal to the left of the walkway
large ceremonial urn on a stone pedestal to the right of the walkway
highly polished reflective marble floor showing reflections of the architecture
recessed wall niches containing statues along the left wall
recessed wall niches containing statues along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through a grand cathedral interior bathed in warm golden artificial light. The space features ornate historic stone architecture with statues recessed into wall niches, and a highly polished marble floor that reflects the surrounding pillars and arches. The camera approaches a large carved wooden door at the far end of the hall, passing decorative urns on pedestals to either side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a grand cathedral interior that leads from the open hall toward a singular focal point. It begins by gliding across highly polished marble floors, where the warm golden artificial light reflects off the stone pillars and arches. As the camera advances, it passes ornate statues recessed into wall niches and decorative urns on pedestals that line the path. The scene then narrows its focus, steadily approaching a large, intricately carved wooden door situated at the far end of the hall.
